result: Phase 0 continuation — reading existing codebase to understand interfaces

Read all existing modules: config.py (EditorConfig), bgm_analyzer.py (BgmAnalysis), emotion_funnel.py (EmotionFunnel), whisper_asr.py (WhisperTranscriber), audio_sync.py (AudioSyncEngine), utils/ffmpeg.py, utils/db.py, profiles/base.py

Found 5 modules already fully implemented: modules/__init__.py (MaterialScanner=0.2), matcher.py (0.7), vlog_editor.py (0.8), output_pipeline.py (0.9), face_tracker.py (0.10), hook_extractor.py (0.11)
Created modules/subtitle_generator.py (0.12) — SubtitleGenerator class with SRT generation, bilingual support, ASS style config, FFmpeg filter and MoviePy overlay support
Created modules/renderer.py (0.13) — PreviewRenderer (720p 30s preview) + ParallelRenderer (multiprocessing, 6 variants, progress callbacks, CRF=23 preset=medium)
Created api.py (0.14) — FastAPI with all endpoints (/scan, /analyze, /edit, /render, /preview, /export, /jobs, /profiles, /health), background tasks, Pydantic models, CORS, Swagger /docs
Created cli.py (0.14) — CLI with commands: scan, analyze, edit, render, preview, subtitle, hook, crop, serve, info. Rich output formatting, JSON export support
Created HANDOFF.md (0.15) — Complete handoff doc with project overview, architecture diagram, API reference, CLI examples, config guide, Phase 1 extension guide
Created requirements.txt — All Python dependencies with version pins (librosa, madmom, faster-whisper, moviepy, fastapi, uvicorn, mediapipe, etc.)
Updated profiles/__init__.py — Added proper docstring and re-exports (ProfileConfig, VlogProfile, GuitarProfile, DanceProfile, PROFILES, get_profile, list_profiles)
All 15 modules accounted for. 0.1-0.6 existing, 0.2/0.7-0.11 found pre-existing, 0.12-0.15 newly created. No interface modifications to existing code.
